title: Interstellar Soundtrack
description: Replaces all music from the game with the soundtrack from "Interstellar."
body:
## Interstellar soundtrack resource pack

This resource pack completely replaces Minecraft's original background music with Hans Zimmer's iconic, uplifting, and profound score from Christopher Nolan's film, **Interstellar**.

Feel how the track **"Cornfield Chase"** imbues your exploration of endless biomes with a sense of discovery, while the powerful organs of **"No Time For Caution"** echo during climactic battles. The melancholic and beautiful theme of **"S.T.A.Y."** creates a unique atmosphere for contemplating sunsets or grandiose construction, while the cosmic emptiness of the soundtrack takes your journey to the End or the Nether to a new, epic level.

The pack is carefully tailored to gameplay: calm compositions accompany your routine, while the most intense and exciting themes activate at key moments. This is not just a music replacement - it completely transforms the game's atmosphere into a story of survival, hope, and conquering the unknown.

**Features:**
Complete replacement of all background music (Overworld, Nether, End, Creative Mode, menus, etc.)
Carefully selected tracks to match in-game situations
High-quality sound
Immersive atmosphere of space saga and science fiction

Turn your Minecraft into your own personal space odyssey. Install the pack and begin your **Interstellar** adventure!

**All musical compositions belong to Hans Zimmer, Warner Bros. and Paramount Pictures. This fan-made resource pack is for non-commercial use only. I do not claim ownership of the music.**
